titleStmt.title: SII 30.203: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 203. (A.R. No. 279 of 1915.) Kaḍalūr, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Agnīsvara temple-on some detached stones in the same place 10-11th c. A.D.

summary.p: Fragments. Probably belongs to the reign of Rājarāja I. Registers the gift of gold (1/8 poṉ) for burning perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukaṇṭīsvaradēvar at Paḻampaṭṭaṇam. Nāḍanārai and his younger brother Irēvaṉ accepted to burn the lamp after receiving the gold. The next inscription refers to another gift of land (1050 kuḻi) for food offering to Āḍavallār (Naṭarāja), in the temple of Tirukaṇṭīśvaram. The inscription also records Vaikānasan Gōvindan Selvaṉ and another official Ādanūr uḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭṭina nāṭṭup paḻampaṭṭaṇattu śrīkoyiluṭaiya na vāḷateva Ivaṉ tirukkaṇṭiśvaradevaṟku Oru nan=tā viḷakku Erippataṟkku vaiytta poṉ koṇṭu viḷakkerippatāṉom śrīkoyiluṭaiya nāṭaṉāṟaiyu
Erippatāṉom muṭṭil nicatam Araikkāṟ poṉ voṭṭik kuṭuttom In=tataṇṭamiṟuttumivviḷakkerippitāṉom nāṭaṉāṟaiyum Ivaṉṟampi Irevaṉumivviruvom ..

Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ neṭumarattu taḷavīran perumāṟ caṭaiyaṉnen Ippaṭi ntimuḻāṉ man=tiniṟaiyaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ koṭu Ūr vaikāṉasan kovintan celvannen cuṭṭappaṭṭa mahānakarattārum Iṉāṭu vakai ceykiṉṟa Ātanūruṭaiyārum Iruntu Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa
vaṅkārammāna nilam Āirattaimpatu kuḻikkum nilanivantam ceyattirukkaṇṭiśvarattu Āṭavallārkku Ucciyam potu Amutu ceytaruḷa tiruvamutarici nānāḻikkum nellukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kaṟiamutukkuk kaṟiyamutonṟum porikkaṟi Amutonṟummāka kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭukku nel ..
Digital edition of SII 30.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
